# src/implement

Implements the `are implement` command ŌĆö executes AI-driven code changes in isolated worktrees with and without ARE documentation, evaluates quality via blind comparison, and persists metrics.

## Contents

**[executor.ts](./executor.ts)** ŌĆö `executeImplementation` spawns Claude CLI subprocess with `--allowedTools Read,Glob,Grep,Bash,Write,Edit` (40-minute timeout, `--max-turns 50`), parses JSON output via ClaudeBackend, computes cost via getModelPricing/computeCost, extracts metrics via extractImplementationMetrics, returns ImplementationRunResult with token counts, latency, cost breakdown, git stats, test/build/lint results.

**[evaluator.ts](./evaluator.ts)** ŌĆö `evaluateImplementations` runs blind AI evaluation with randomized planA/planB presentation (50/50 via Math.random()) to prevent position bias, scores implementations on five weighted criteria (codeQuality 30%, completeness 25%, testCoverage 20%, errorHandling 15%, adherenceToSpec 10%), parses JSON response via extractJson regex (`/```(?:json)?\s*\n([\s\S]*?)\n```/`), maps scores back to withDocs/withoutDocs labels, returns ImplementationEvaluation with totalScoreA/totalScoreB.

**[metrics.ts](./metrics.ts)** ŌĆö `extractImplementationMetrics` analyzes worktree git stats (filesCreated, filesModified, linesAdded, linesDeleted, commitCount) via simpleGit().diffSummary(['HEAD~1']) or .status() fallback, optionally runs test suite (parses pass/fail counts via `/(\d+)\s+pass(?:ed|ing)/i`, `/(\d+)\s+fail(?:ed|ing)/i` from npm test output), linter (extracts errors/warnings via `/(\d+)\s+error/i`, `/(\d+)\s+warning/i` from npm run lint), build (checks exit code from npm run build), returns ImplementationMetrics with all quality gate results.

**[prompts.ts](./prompts.ts)** ŌĆö `buildImplementationPrompt` constructs agentic prompt with task, optional plan text (from `are plan`), conditional quality gates (runTests: "Write comprehensive tests for all new code", runBuild: "Ensure the build passes (run `npm run build`)", runLint: "Fix all lint errors and warnings"), exploration directive when no plan provided; `buildEvaluatorPrompt` constructs blind evaluation prompt with strict JSON schema (five 1-5 scores, reasoning strings, summary).

**[storage.ts](./storage.ts)** ŌĆö Persists ImplementationComparison records to `.agents-reverse-engineer/implementations/<id>/` containing `comparison.json`, `implementation-with-docs.log`, `implementation-without-docs.log`; exports `saveComparison` (writes directory structure), `loadComparison` (exact or partial ID match), `listComparisons` (sorted by startTime descending).

**[types.ts](./types.ts)** ŌĆö Defines data contracts: ImplementationMetrics (git stats + test/build/lint results), ImplementationRunResult (tokens, latency, cost, metrics, log, success/error), CriterionScore (1-5 score + reasoning), ImplementationEvaluation (randomized planA/planB labels, five criterion scores, totals, summary), ComparisonDeltas (computed differences for cost, latency, file ratios, quality scores), ImplementationComparison (full comparison record with branches, results, evaluation, deltas), ImplementOptions (CLI flags).

**[index.ts](./index.ts)** ŌĆö Re-exports public API: executeImplementation, extractImplementationMetrics, buildImplementationPrompt, buildEvaluatorPrompt, evaluateImplementations, saveComparison, loadComparison, listComparisons, renderComparison, renderHeader, renderPhaseStart, renderPhaseComplete, renderList, plus all types.

## Subdirectories

**[views/](./views/)** ŌĆö Renders terminal UI for comparison results (side-by-side metrics table, quality scores, artifact paths) and saved comparison lists (date, task, model, cost, status columns).

## Architecture

**Two-phase execution workflow:**
1. `executeImplementation` runs twice (with and without docs) in isolated worktrees, each producing ImplementationRunResult
2. `evaluateImplementations` performs blind quality assessment with randomized presentation order
3. Results combined into ImplementationComparison, deltas computed, persisted via `saveComparison`

**Subprocess isolation:** All AI interactions run in ephemeral mode (`--no-session-persistence --disable-slash-commands`). Evaluation uses `--max-turns 1 --tools ''` for non-agentic single-shot responses; implementation uses `--max-turns 50` with full write permissions.

**Metric extraction:** Git analysis via simpleGit, quality checks via npm script subprocess invocations (test/lint/build), all failures caught with zero/false defaults.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Evaluation weights:** `{codeQuality: 0.30, completeness: 0.25, testCoverage: 0.20, errorHandling: 0.15, adherenceToSpec: 0.10}`

**Timeouts:** `IMPLEMENTATION_TIMEOUT_MS = 2_400_000` (40 min), `EVAL_TIMEOUT_MS = 300_000` (5 min)

**Allowed tools:** Implementation: `Read,Glob,Grep,Bash,Write,Edit`; Evaluation: empty string (text-only)

**JSON extraction regex:** `/```(?:json)?\s*\n([\s\S]*?)\n```/` for markdown code fences, fallback to indexOf('{') and lastIndexOf('}') for raw objects

**Test output parsing:** `/(\d+)\s+pass(?:ed|ing)/i`, `/(\d+)\s+fail(?:ed|ing)/i` (Vitest/Jest)

**Lint output parsing:** `/(\d+)\s+error/i`, `/(\d+)\s+warning/i`

**Quality check timeouts:** test=300s, lint=120s, build=300s

## Integration Points

Depends on:
- `../ai/subprocess.js` ŌåÆ runSubprocess (spawn claude CLI with timeoutMs/cwd)
- `../ai/backends/claude.js` ŌåÆ ClaudeBackend (parseResponse)
- `../dashboard/cost-calculator.js` ŌåÆ getModelPricing, computeCost, CostBreakdown type

Consumed by:
- `../cli/implement.ts` ŌĆö wires up worktree creation, branch switching, subprocess invocations
